data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any specific checks or endpoints that confirm the implementation of per-order license key issuance and status tracking. While the linked use case outlines the need for this functionality, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that it has been fulfilled or validated. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence regarding the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence of per-order license key issuance and status tracking implementation or validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add endpoint for license key issuance validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the per-order license key issuance and status tracking.
